name: Perk's Golf & Entertainment
about: Perk's Golf & Entertainment is a multi-sport simulator venue featuring state-of-the-art technology for both golf and other sports. They offer golf simulators with world-famous courses and multisport options including zombie dodgeball, baseball, soccer, and disc golf. The venue is designed for golfers of all skill levels and provides a fun, relaxed setting for parties and special events. Pricing is based on a per-bay hourly model with options for up to 8 people per bay.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art golf simulator technology with incredible accuracy and realism
Access to world-famous golf courses for practice and play
Multisport simulator offers nonstop action beyond golf
Flexible party packages and special events for all group sizes
Accommodates up to 8 players per simulator bay with comfortable seating

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB is not mentioned, but not explicitly prohibited
BYOB is not mentioned, but not explicitly prohibited

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use your own golf clubs and balls to ensure your rounds and practice sessions are as realistic as possible.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a policy on bringing outside food and drinks, so it's best to contact them directly for confirmation.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a round of 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, it takes an average of 1 hour per person to play a round of 18 holes on their simulators, depending on the number of players and their familiarity with the simulator.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Perk's Golf & Entertainment is kid-friendly, offering multisport simulators with games suitable for all ages, making it a fun-packed experience for families.
